programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: The Black family thrived after their rescue three years ago, but success has brought with it new, overwhelming issues; Marty returns to the Black Hills to help them battle the elements as they rebuild to protect against inclement weather.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Intervention
programme.desc: The Raneys intervene to save an Alaskan family exiled to tents by a mold-infested cabin; facing bears, an arsenic-laced spring, and staring down a seven-month winter, they have one shot to make the homestead livable.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch

programme.desc: When Sig's crane blows a hydraulic line, Clark ascends the rig in 20-foot seas for a critical repair; the Cornelia Marie crew battles a fire as Jake's engine room fills with smoke.

programme.desc: Sig teaches Sophia how to captain the Northwestern at the Russian line.

programme.title: The Bassquatch Hunter: Fish Out of Water

programme.title: Jeff Dunham's the Cars That Drove Us

programme.title: 120 Hours Behind Bars
programme.desc: In Clay County, Mississippi, where gun deaths are an epidemic and the median income sits 66% below the national average, Sheriff Scott and his team fight to keep order inside a jail where the consequences of a community in crisis arrive daily.

programme.title: Major League Fishing
programme.desc: Heavy Hitters Qualifying Group A Day Two from Marion County, FL. Anglers compete to advance as well as for the $10,000 Big Bass Bonus.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: The Kruger Millions in the harsh wild of South Africa.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh Gates sets off deep into the Australian Outback, following the footsteps of legendary explorer Harold Lasseter, who claims to have found a vast field of gold.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: To find the plundered riches of the Roman Empire, Josh Gates must locate the tomb of the Visigoth king Alaric in Italy; the hunt extends from the capital of Rome to the southern city of Cosenza.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh Gates hunts for the hidden treasure of Erwin Rommel, a Nazi general who plundered the wealth of North Africa as his tank corps fled the continent; never-explored underground lakes and undersea relics of World War II.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh Gates investigates the legends swirling around the storied life and death of French pirate Jean Lafitte who is reputed to have buried treasure at sites in coastal Louisiana.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh Gates heads to an active dig site in Egypt where he joins famous archaeologist Dr. Zahi Hawass on the cusp of an incredible discovery -- the mummy of an ancient high priest.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: A survey reveals a submerged pirate lair located off the coast of Jamaica; using photogrammetry, Josh dives in to hunt for the $50M stolen treasure of Black Bart, the King of Pirates.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: A wilderness guide and a software engineer diagnosed with Asperger's try to survive in the Botswana desert; herds of aggressive elephants threaten their security at night, but their biggest hurdle is learning to communicate with each other.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: A wilderness EMT and a hard-headed homesteader try to survive in a coastal Colombian jungle; when their priorities clash, their partnership becomes volatile.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: Two survivalists fight to endure 21 days of extreme dehydration in the drought-stricken Everglades. With no potable water available, the pair is threatened with an early tap-out.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: An unlikely duo, a hairdresser and a former correctional officer, must survive 14 days in Zambia, home to some of Africa's most dangerous wildlife; with predators all around and a herd of aggressive elephants closing in, their survival is threatened.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: The world's strangest ghost towns are home to dark secrets, creepy buildings and eerie sights; new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Contraband: Seized at the Border
programme.desc: Officers find an 18-wheeler carrying more than a load of takeout containers; a couple raises suspicion after declaring bulldog semen, but the labeling suggests the box may actually contain stallion semen, a valuable and tightly regulated substance.

programme.title: Contraband: Seized at the Border
programme.desc: A traveler is caught with blades for cockfighting, a cartel-run blood sport; every year, Mexico grows millions of dollars of flowers for the U.S., but cartels are taking advantage of the influx of shipments during major holidays.

programme.title: In the Eye of the Storm
programme.desc: In April 2024, dozens of tornadoes ravaged NE's Central Plains; eyewitnesses find themselves in the wrong place at the wrong time as twisters tear through neighborhoods, demolish massive commercial structures, and topple semi-trailers.

programme.title: In the Eye of the Storm
programme.desc: In March 2025, thousands of eyewitnesses capture disaster at their doorsteps as extreme atmospheric volatility unleashes a massive Texas haboob and more than 150 tornadoes across the southern states, devastating towns and homesteads in their path.

programme.title: In the Eye of the Storm
programme.desc: In 2024, hundreds of cameras capture hurricanes slamming Florida's Gulf Coast; as category four Hurricane Helene brings record flooding, residents have no chance to recover before category three Hurricane Milton unleashes over 40 tornadoes.

programme.title: In the Eye of the Storm
programme.desc: Hurricane Helene barrels north into Appalachia, dumping 30 inches of rain; as hundreds of cameras capture flooding and mudslides, one woman gets swept away by the deluge, until a man attending a wedding rehearsal jumps into the water to save her.

programme.title: In the Eye of the Storm
programme.desc: When a rare EF-3 tornado touches down in northern Michigan, cameras capture the chaos and disbelief.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Global Showdown
programme.desc: The final four teams build four-pronged, fire-hardened spears to skewer fish. One team's spear -- and partnership -- breaks under pressure.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Global Showdown
programme.desc: The final three teams migrate to the shores of the Indian Ocean; two teams score crab, stingray and octopus, but the third struggles to get food; during a smoke-and-snare challenge, unexpected stumbles lead to an elimination challenge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Global Showdown
programme.desc: With national pride on the line, the last two teams square off in a multi-stage gauntlet testing their ability to build traps, shoot targets, bushcraft weapons and make fire; in a neck-and-neck battle, they fight to raise their flag and win $200,000.

programme.title: In the Eye of the Storm
programme.desc: When Hurricane Harvey hit Texas with 130 mph winds and record-breaking rain, cameras captured catastrophic flooding as entire neighborhoods vanished, forcing civilians to risk their own lives to save others.

programme.title: In the Eye of the Storm: Chasers
programme.desc: Near Gary, S.D., expert chasers and certified weather spotters self-shoot an encounter with a long-track, shape-shifting tornado; when the twister takes a turn towards an occupied farmhouse, chasers are thrust into the role of first responders.

programme.title: Airplane Repo

programme.title: Airplane Repo
programme.desc: Mike Kennedy repossesses a chopper from a high-rise; Kevin infiltrates a Mexican ranch to obtain a family plane; Ken and Danny are against a rival repo team.

programme.title: Airplane Repo
programme.desc: Ken and Danny seize a luxury yacht; Mike devises a revenge plan against a deadbeat; Kevin and Heather are in a midair nightmare.

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: Game wardens are ready for springtime in Texas; wardens investigate a video of an illegal hunter; a concerned citizen reports a hunter on his property; a fisherman is illegally catching oysters; a game warden smells something fishy going on.

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: Dockery responds to a call about an alligator found near a residential area; game wardens find blood in a hunter's car after the hunter claimed he didn't shoot anything; Boone follows up on a call about five raccoons in someone's home.

programme.desc: In East Texas a young woman is served an arrest warrant; a fisherman has no fishing license but plenty of outstanding warrants; outside Austin, someone illegally dumps a pile of trash.

programme.desc: Eddins helps a neighbor in need; Reneau responds to a call about a baby red-tailed hawk; Richards attempts to serve an arrest warrant; Startz patrols solo on the Guadalupe River; wardens monitor the Rio Grande.

programme.title: 120 Hours Behind Bars

programme.title: 120 Hours Behind Bars

programme.title: 120 Hours Behind Bars

programme.title: In the Eye of the Storm: Chasers

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Intervention
programme.desc: On a mesa in Arizona, the Raneys step into a homestead and marriage under strain; to secure the family's future, they must pull an ambitious husband away from his years-long, unfinished passion project, and force a hard reset before total collapse.

programme.title: Ready Player One
programme.desc: In 2045, the creator of a virtual reality universe promises his fortune to the first person to discover a digital Easter egg. Soon, young Wade Watts finds himself in a reality-bending treasure hunt through the mysterious and fantastical world.

programme.title: Tag
programme.desc: Five highly competitive friends hit the ground running for their yearly, no-holds-barred game of tag -- risking their necks, their jobs and their relationships to take one another down.

programme.title: Ocean's Eight
programme.desc: Debbie Ocean assembles an all-female team of thieves and specialists for a heist during the Met Gala, aiming for the $150 million worth of diamonds around the neck of world-famous actress Daphne Kluger.

programme.title: Us
programme.desc: A couple and their two children must fight for survival when four masked strangers descend upon their beachfront home. When the masks come off, the family is horrified to learn that each attacker takes the appearance of one of them.

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Ambition turns into annihilation as Rhaenyra and Aegon tighten their grips on a crumbling throne; betrayal, prophecy and fire redraw the fate of Westeros in blood.

programme.title: Lurker
programme.desc: A retail employee infiltrates the inner circle of an artist on the verge of stardom. As he gets closer to the budding music star, access and proximity become a matter of life and death.

programme.title: Miss You, Love You
programme.desc: A blunt, grieving widow is forced to plan her husband's funeral with a total stranger: her estranged son's assistant.

programme.title: Undertone
programme.desc: The host of a popular paranormal podcast is sent hidden messages within anonymous recordings, unleashing a demonic presence that is impossible to escape.

programme.title: Life, Larry and the Pursuit of Unhappiness
programme.desc: Larry crashes a party in Boston Harbor; Joe McCarthy airs his grievances on the Senate floor.

programme.title: Hereditary
programme.desc: When the matriarch of the Graham family passes away, her daughter and grandchildren begin to unravel cryptic and increasingly terrifying secrets about their ancestry, trying to outrun the sinister fate they have inherited.

programme.title: The Man Will Burn
programme.desc: Tracing the evolution of Burning Man, from its anarchic countercultural roots in San Francisco to the 80,000-person desert gathering it has become.
Tragedy strikes when Heathcliff falls in love with Catherine Earnshaw, a woman from a wealthy family in 18th-century England.

programme.title: The Moment
programme.desc: As her arena tour debut looms, a pop star finds herself caught inside the afterglow of a breakout summer under the mounting pressure of what it costs to stay on top.

programme.title: Legally Blonde
programme.desc: A sorority queen (Reese Witherspoon) enrolls in Harvard to prove to her former boyfriend that she has more than good looks.

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Ambition turns into annihilation as Rhaenyra and Aegon tighten their grips on a crumbling throne; betrayal, prophecy and fire redraw the fate of Westeros in blood.

programme.title: Life, Larry and the Pursuit of Unhappiness
programme.desc: President and Mrs. Obama want to honor America's 250th anniversary and celebrate the history of the nation on the occasion, but then Larry David calls.

programme.title: Dumb Money
programme.desc: Everyday people flip the script on Wall Street and get rich by turning GameStop into one of the world's hottest companies. In the middle of everything is Keith Gill, a regular guy who starts it all by sinking his life savings into the stock.

programme.title: Dumb Money
programme.desc: Everyday people flip the script on Wall Street and get rich by turning GameStop into one of the world's hottest companies. In the middle of everything is Keith Gill, a regular guy who starts it all by sinking his life savings into the stock.

programme.title: Goodbye Christopher Robin
programme.desc: Author A.A. Milne finds inspiration from his son to write Winnie-the-Pooh and The House at Pooh Corner in the 1920s. His family soon becomes swept up in the success of the books, while the tales bring hope and comfort to postwar England.

programme.title: MacGruber
programme.desc: After his sworn enemy steals a nuclear warhead, a clueless soldier-of-fortune (Will Forte) leads a skilled team on a mission to retrieve the device and bring the thief to justice.

programme.title: Evil Dead
programme.desc: At a remote forest cabin, five friends discover a Book of the Dead and unwittingly summon an ancient demon. The malevolent entity possesses each person in succession, until only one is left intact to fight for survival.

programme.title: Evil Dead Rise
programme.desc: A reunion between two estranged sisters gets cut short by the rise of flesh-possessing demons, thrusting them into a primal battle for survival as they face the most nightmarish version of family imaginable.

programme.title: Open Water
programme.desc: Scuba divers (Blanchard Ryan, Daniel Travis) struggle to survive in shark-infested waters after their tour boat accidentally leaves them behind.

programme.title: The Meg
programme.desc: A massive creature attacks a deep-sea submersible, leaving it disabled and trapping the crew at the bottom of the Pacific Ocean. With time running out, a rescue diver must now confront an unimaginable threat'

programme.title: Meg 2: The Trench
programme.desc: Jonas Taylor leads a research team on an exploratory dive into the deepest depths of the ocean. Pitted against colossal, prehistoric sharks and relentless environmental plunderers, they must outrun, outsmart and outswim their merciless predators.

programme.title: The Long Walk
programme.desc: Teens participate in a grueling high-stakes contest where they must continuously walk or be shot by a member of their military escort.

programme.title: How to Make a Killing
programme.desc: Disowned by his obscenely wealthy family, Becket Redfellow will stop at nothing to reclaim his inheritance, no matter how many relatives stand in his way.

programme.title: Earth, Wind & Fire (To Be Celestial vs. That's the Weight of the World)

programme.title: The Sum of All Fears
programme.desc: Jack Ryan (Ben Affleck) and the CIA director (Morgan Freeman) try to stop terrorists who are planning a nuclear attack.

programme.title: Ghost in the Shell
programme.desc: A one-of-a-kind, cyber-enhanced soldier (Scarlett Johansson) must battle a new enemy who can hack into people's minds and control them.

programme.title: The Expendables
programme.desc: A mercenary (Sylvester Stallone) and his men learn that their assignment to overthrow a South American dictator is a suicide mission.

programme.title: The Expendables 2
programme.desc: Mercenary Barney Ross and his team cut a swath of destruction through opposing forces as they take revenge for the vicious murder of a comrade.

programme.title: The Expendables 3
programme.desc: After a former associate makes it his mission to end the Expendables, Barney Ross (Sylvester Stallone) assembles a team of younger, tech-savvy recruits to help take down their enemy.

programme.title: Expend4bles
programme.desc: Armed with every weapon they can get their hands on, the Expendables are the world's last line of defense and the team that gets called when all other options are off the table.

programme.title: Kiss the Girls
programme.desc: After escaping from a serial killer, a doctor (Ashley Judd) helps police and a forensic psychologist (Morgan Freeman) track the madman.

programme.title: The Chi
programme.desc: Detective Toussaint goes down a path to find answers about what happened to Nuck; Tiff throws herself into hosting Kiesha's bachelorette party to avoid her own feelings while Emmett's bachelor party gets turned upside down; Bakari makes a decision.

programme.title: Good Boys
programme.desc: Hoping to learn how to kiss, 12-year-old Max decides to use his father's drone to spy on the teenage girls next door. When Max loses the drone, he skips school with his two best friends and hatches a plan to get it back before his dad finds out.

programme.title: Daddy's Home
programme.desc: An insecure man (Will Ferrell) competes for the affection of his stepchildren when their freewheeling father (Mark Wahlberg) breezes back into town.

programme.title: The Mechanic
programme.desc: An elite hitman teaches his trade to an apprentice who has a connection to one of his previous victims.

programme.title: No Country for Old Men
programme.desc: An aging lawman (Tommy Lee Jones) reflects on his past and laments a changing world while trying to find and protect a hunter who took the cash from a drug deal gone bad.

programme.title: Borg vs. McEnroe
programme.desc: In 1980 top tennis player Björn Borg is in pursuit of a record-breaking fifth Wimbledon championship. The only obstacle in his way is the highly talented and ferociously abrasive young American John McEnroe.

programme.title: Overdrive
programme.desc: A notorious crime boss forces two legendary car thieves to steal a vehicle to win back their freedom. Joined by two beautiful women, the team has one week to pull off the daring heist or risk losing everything, including their lives.

programme.desc: An acting CIA chief (Harrison Ford) learns the president has triggered a war with Colombian drug cartels.

programme.title: Deepwater Horizon

programme.title: Faster

programme.title: The Commuter
programme.desc: In the midst of his daily commute, insurance salesman Michael McCauley is contacted by a mysterious stranger who forces him to uncover the identity of a hidden passenger on the train before the last stop.

programme.desc: Reluctantly pressed into service again, a former military sniper plots revenge against his powerful foes after being betrayed and wounded.

programme.title: Deepwater Horizon
